overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a futuristic urban environment. The video begins with a blue sports car driving under an elevated highway overpass, then transitions to a covered pedestrian walkway lined with massive digital billboards displaying various advertisements. The camera follows different pedestrians, including an NCPD officer, through the neon-lit corridor with consistent cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban underpass beneath elevated highway

events.description: camera begins tracking blue sports car driving under the overpass
camera transitions from vehicle pursuit to pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: tracking a blue sports car from behind as it navigates the underpass, then transitioning to foot level

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving forward under the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass with green metallic support beams
dark concrete wall with illuminated directional signage
large illuminated screen displaying forest nature scene
yellow and black striped safety bollards along the road edge

segments.scene_description: The sequence opens in a futuristic urban underpass beneath an elevated highway. The camera follows a sleek blue sports car driving along the asphalt road, passing yellow-black safety barriers and concrete walls. Overhead, the massive highway structure creates a cavernous sheltered environment with artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising displays

events.description: camera stabilizes to walking pace behind pedestrian in green vest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily behind a pedestrian wearing a green vest and white pants along the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair and vest walking ahead of camera while looking at phone

entered.detail: smooth gray pedestrian walkway surface replacing the asphalt road
angled concrete and steel structural supports for the elevated highway
exposed industrial piping and ductwork running along the walkway ceiling

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the road to a covered pedestrian walkway, the camera follows a pedestrian in a green vest along a concrete sidewalk. The left side features a massive digital billboard wall displaying nature scenes, while the right side shows angled support beams for the overhead highway. The environment is illuminated by artificial lighting with exposed industrial piping overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with fashion and beverage advertisements

events.description: digital billboard content changes to display 'REAL MAN'S SMELL' fragrance advertisement
billboard transitions to showing vehicle and cola product advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing down the walkway passing various pedestrians while observing the changing digital advertisements on the left wall

notable_agents.action: woman in red crop top walking past camera in opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along the covered walkway where the digital billboards now display commercial advertisements including fragrance and fashion content. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the concrete path, with the elevated highway structure remaining visible on the right. The corridor maintains its cyberpunk aesthetic with neon lighting and industrial elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: security corridor with military and vehicle advertisements

events.description: camera begins following NCPD officer in tactical gear

agents.ego_description: walking behind an NCPD officer and a civilian companion through the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer in black tactical gear with NCPD logo on back walking ahead
woman in beige outfit walking alongside the NCPD officer

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera follows an NCPD officer and a civilian walking ahead along the covered walkway. The digital billboards now display military-themed advertisements and security service promotions. The environment remains consistent with the elevated highway structure on the right and the illuminated advertising wall on the left, maintaining the futuristic urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cavernous urban underpass into a neon-lit pedestrian corridor dominated by massive digital advertisements. It begins by tracking a sleek blue sports car driving along an asphalt road beneath the heavy concrete structure of an elevated highway. As the camera shifts from the road to a covered sidewalk, the environment opens into a pedestrian walkway where the industrial concrete walls give way to a towering wall of digital billboards displaying nature scenes. The scene then proceeds further along the corridor as the imagery on the screens shifts toward commercial fashion and fragrance ads, with pedestrians moving through the artificial glow of the cyberpunk architecture. Finally, the camera follows an NCPD officer and a civilian as the advertising wall transforms again to show military and security promotions under the persistent shadow of the highway overpass.
